headline: Six Dividend Aristocrats Keeping SCHD’s Income Stream Bulletproof This Year
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) pays a quarterly distribution from roughly 100 quality-screened U.S. dividend stocks. The fund holds $71.6 billion in assets at an expense ratio of just 0.06%, and it tracks the Dow Jones U.S. Dividend 100 Index, which requires 10 consecutive years of dividend payments and screens on cash flow to ... headline: Coca-Cola (KO) North America Chief Is Stepping Down As CFO Takes Interim Role
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) has announced that Jennifer Mann, Executive Vice President and President of the North America Operating Unit, will step down at the end of July 2026. President and Chief Financial Officer John Murphy will assume interim operational responsibility for the North America business. The change affects Coca-Cola’s largest market and involves one of the company’s most senior leaders. Coca-Cola is one of the world’s largest beverage companies, with its North America unit...
